reviews.comment:
Una estación de servicio en muy buenas condiciones, buen lugar para ser un parador en el viaje. Baños limpios y en condiciones, gran variedad de articulos en el full ypf, lo unico malo que las bebidas las tenían al natural a pesar de estar en las heladeras.

(Translated by Google)
A gas station in very good condition, a good place to stop along the way. Clean and well-maintained restrooms, a wide variety of items at the YPF full station; the only downside was that the drinks were served at room temperature despite being in the refrigerators.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2MEwzY0lnEAE
